description: Query quota and usage statistics for GLM Coding Plan service
command.query.title: GLM Plan Usage: Query Usage Statistics
command.query.description: Query current GLM plan usage and quota information
command.setToken.title: GLM Plan Usage: Set API Key
command.setToken.description: Securely set your GLM API Key using encrypted storage (never written to files)
configuration.title: GLM Plan Usage
configuration.authToken.description: Authentication token for GLM Coding Plan (GLM_API_KEY)
configuration.authToken.deprecated: Token is now stored securely via SecretStorage. Use the "GLM Plan Usage: Set API Key" command instead.
configuration.autoRefresh.description: Automatically refresh usage statistics on startup
configuration.refreshInterval.descriptio: Auto-refresh interval in seconds (0 to disable)
